title: geoBoundaries Syrian Arab Republic Administrative Boundaries
notes: Preferred seed source for reusable administrative boundary references. Current Syria ADM1, ADM2, and ADM3 gbOpen sources are UN OCHA via HDX, distributed through geoBoundaries. Import manifests record exact API URLs.

title: GeoNames Syrian Arab Republic Gazetteer Extract
notes: Useful for place names, alternate names, coordinates, and feature IDs.

title: Wikidata
notes: Useful for public identifiers and cross-checking.

title: OpenStreetMap
notes: Restricted to review/comparison unless an ODbL-compatible release approach is approved.
